name: Rockwell Automation, Inc.
description: Rockwell Automation, Inc. is a global leader in industrial automation and digital transformation, dedicated to making its customers more productive and the world more sustainable. Headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, the company integrates control and information platforms, software, and services to help manufacturers optimize their operations. Its comprehensive portfolio includes Allen-Bradley industrial control and automation components and FactoryTalk integrated software. By connecting the imaginations of people with the potential of technology, Rockwell Automation enables the 'Connected Enterprise,' driving efficiency and innovation across diverse industries worldwide.

investment_theses.company_type: Industrial Automation / Smart Manufacturing for Reshoring
